---
title: "Trip Segmentation and Movement Behavior"
author: "Jaylen"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Trip Segmentation and Movement Behavior}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
library(Shearwater)
library(dplyr)

# Load data relative to project root
prep_data <- read.csv("inst/extdata/example_wtsh_data.csv")

# 1: Segmented trips
segmented_data <- prep_data %>%
  group_by(animal_id) %>%
  segment_trips(max_time_gap = 120, min_dist_gap = 500) %>%
  ungroup()

head(segmented_data)

# 2: 
classified_data <- segmented_data %>%
  classify_trip_phase()
  
# 3:
final_processed_data <- classified_data %>%
  label_day_night_period()
  
# 4:
vignette_summary <- final_processed_data %>%
  group_by(animal_id, trip_id) %>%
  summarize(
    total_distance_km = sum(distance_meters, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000,
    duration_hours = as.numeric(difftime(max(timestamp), min(timestamp), units = "hours")),
    pct_foraging = mean(behavior_phase == "foraging", na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

head(vignette_summary)
